    "type": "text",
    "text": "{\n  \"markdown\": \"[Discover curated, free images for your projects!\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\nExplore Lummi](https://www.lummi.ai/?utm_source=openpeeps&utm_medium=banner&utm_campaign=open-peeps)\\n\\n# Open Peeps\\n\\n## A hand-drawn illustration library.\\n\\n[Use with Blush](https://blush.design/collections/open-peeps) [Download](https://gum.co/openpeeps?wanted=true&referrer=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.openpeeps.com%2F)\\n\\n![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e5333c433d3681a7a3d6205_logo-sketch.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e5333c416879cfa0fc96689_logo-figma.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e5333c433d36859d13d6204_logo-xd.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e5333c4258ffe29268f3b1d_logo-studio.svg)[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5ee84ffb67164de36645a3bc_happy.svg)](https://blush.design/collections/open-peeps)\\n\\nOpen Peeps by [Pablo Stanley](https://www.instagram.com/pablostanley/).\\n\\nFree for commercial and personal use under [CC0 License.](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/)\\n\\n![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e5346352c16e8d69e1649f2_cover_hero-1.svg)\\n\\n![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e535cc633d3686b733e5265_mix-7.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e535cc533d36869f23e5264_mix-6.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e5352682c16e8c454168a64_mix-1.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e535268258ffe32dc8fff6e_mix-2.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e5352682c16e81879168a65_mix-3.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e535268258ffe5ed58fff70_mix-4.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e535268258ffebd1d8fff6f_mix-5.svg)\\n\\n### Mix & Match.\\n\\nThe library works like building blocks made of vector arms, legs, and emotions. You can mix these elements to create different Peeps.\\n\\n- Combine clothing and hairstyles to add flair.\\n\\n- Change emotion with different facial expressions.\\n\\n- Set the scene with different poses—including standing and sitting\\n\\n[Download Library](https://gum.co/openpeeps?wanted=true&referrer=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.openpeeps.com%2F)\\n\\n### Creations for all occasions.\\n\\nYou can use Open Peeps in product illustration, marketing imagery, comics, product states, user flows, personas, storyboarding, invitations for your quinceañera...or anything else not on this list.\\n\\nThe library is in the public domain under the [CC0 License](https://www.openpeeps.com/#). This means you can copy, modify, distribute, remix, burn, and use the work, even for commercial purposes, without asking permission.\\n\\n[Download Library](https://gum.co/openpeeps?wanted=true&referrer=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.openpeeps.com%2F)\\n\\n![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e51c36e16879c45e6c0fb6f_sit-stand-walk.svg)\\n\\n![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e536822eba2592eaf41e696_slider-4.svg)\\n\\n![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e53696e33d36873203e829f_slider-3.svg)\\n\\n![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e53699f33d3683a073e83a2_slider-2.svg)\\n\\n![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e536c6633d36859653e8ba1_slider-5.svg)\\n\\n![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e53682233d368dfa63e7deb_slider-1.svg)\\n\\n### How to mix a Peep.\\n\\nCreating a character is easy! Use any product design tool like Sketch, Figma, XD, or Studio to mix nested components.\\n\\nThere are over 584,688 possible combinations (yup, someone did the math!)\\n\\n#### Top them off\\n\\nYou can choose curly, long, short, or no hair at all.\\n\\n#### Give the gift of vision\\n\\nChoose from clear lenses and sunnies.\\n\\n#### Add a feeling\\n\\nPut an emotion on that beautiful face.\\n\\n#### Select a body\\n\\nBody language is just as important!\\n\\n#### Add facial hair\\n\\nEveryone loves a mustache—or beard, or...you get it.\\n\\n#### Change the colors\\n\\nThe black and white colors are just a starting point—you can customize them!\\n\\n![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51b3b0337309d672efd94c/5e5344373373094088f94ebe_how-to.gif)\\n\\n### Grab and go!\\n\\nGet started with these ready-to-download Peeps.\\n\\n[Busts](https://www.openpeeps.com/#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-0) [Standing](https://www.openpeeps.com/#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-1) [Sitting](https://www.openpeeps.com/#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-2)\\n\\n![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51c674258ffe10d286d30a/5e5357c17371bbccb99ecadf_peep-53.svg)\\n\\n[PNG](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e51c674258ffe10d286d30a/5e5357c58becbf70a753467d_peep-53.png)
